# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SsaAnomalyLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

Trains an SSA model for anomaly detection (spike or change point). Fit() computes SVD of the trajectory matrix from training data.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class SsaAnomalyLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
